docket_entries.description: DEFENDANT'S EXHIBIT RECEIVED (TELEPHONE APPEARANCE FOR JANUARY 19, 2021) FORWARDED TO DEPT. 506 AS TO DEFENDANT EXPEDIA INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-19-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-03-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OSCAR GONZALEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EXPEDIA INC.IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LIDIYA KOLEVA, ESCALATION QUALITY LEAD, APPEARING TELEPHONICALLY, COURTCALL. DISCLOSURE IS MADE. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT OF A $378 PAYMENT. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE FEB-03-2021 IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE FEB-03-2021 THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $757.20 FILED BY GONZALEZ, OSCAR AS TO DEFENDANT EXPEDIA INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-19-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: NATIONAL REGISTERED AGENTS, INC) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, OSCAR AS TO DEFENDANT EXPEDIA INC.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (REPRESENTATIVE: SIBEL ABREAU) FILED BY DEFENDANT EXPEDIA INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PUSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED OCT-14-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EXPEDIA INC.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) (REPRESENTATIVE - SIBEL ABREU)- HEARING SET FOR JAN-19-21) FILED BY DEFENDANT EXPEDIA INC.
